role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Agent correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and stayed within its domain by not speculating on language.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, climate, and settlement patterns (socialist-era estates) as appropriate.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Pelargonium, deciduous trees) and their regional prevalence.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed infrastructure standards (fencing, panel buildings, paths) typical of the region.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain architectural and infrastructural cues to distinguish between Central European nations.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Poland. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing grounded evidence (architecture, vegetation, infrastructure) that supported the final decision. The linguistic agent's silence was a correct negative signal.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly noted lack of visible text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described flat terrain and socialist-era architecture.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified geraniums and deciduous trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the wire fencing and panel building style.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately synthesized the visual style of the housing estate.
